steps.expression: async () => { const unique = Date.now(); const tag = `tb${String(unique).slice(-8)}`; const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); const modelEntry = settings.ok ? Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0) : undefined; const modelRefOrNull = modelEntry === undefined ? null : { providerId: modelEntry[0], modelId: modelEntry[1][0] }; const agentResult = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `Toolbar Agent ${unique}`, systemPrompt: 'Agent created for toolbar redesign diagnostics.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: [tag], modelRefOrNull }); if (!agentResult.ok) { return { ok: false, stage: 'agent' }; } const councilResult = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: `Toolbar Council ${unique}`, topic: 'Council created for toolbar redesign diagnostics.', goal: null, mode: 'manual', tags: [tag], memberAgentIds: [agentResult.value.agent.id], memberColorsByAgentId: {}, conductorModelRefOrNull: modelRefOrNull }); if (!councilResult.ok) { return { ok: false, stage: 'council' }; } window.__homeListToolbarScenario = { unique, tag, agentName: agentResult.value.agent.name, councilTitle: councilResult.value.council.title, agentId: agentResult.value.agent.id, councilId: councilResult.value.council.id }; return { ok: true }; }

async () => { const sleep = (ms) => new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, ms)); const waitFor = async (predicate, label) => { const started = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - started < 5000) { const result = predicate(); if (result) { return result; } await sleep(50); } throw new Error(`Timed out waiting for ${label}`); }; const clickTextButton = async (label) => { const button = await waitFor(() => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === label), `button ${label}`); button.click(); await sleep(100); return button; }; const setValue = (field, value) => { const prototype = field instanceof HTMLInputElement ? HTMLInputElement.prototype : field instanceof HTMLSelectElement ? HTMLSelectElement.prototype : HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype; const descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(prototype, 'value'); descriptor?.set?.call(field, value); field.dispatchEvent(new Event(field instanceof HTMLSelectElement ? 'change' : 'input', { bubbles: true })); }; const scenario = window.__homeListToolbarScenario; if (!scenario) { throw new Error('Missing toolbar scenario seed'); } await clickTextButton('Agents'); const panel = await waitFor(() => document.querySelector('#home-panel-agents'), 'agents panel'); const search = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`input[aria-label='Search agents']`), 'agent search'); const refresh = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`button[data-home-list-refresh-button='true']`), 'agent refresh button'); const filter = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`button[data-home-list-filter-button='true']`), 'agent filter button'); const newButton = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`button[data-home-list-new-button='true']`), 'agent new button'); await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`[data-agent-card-id='${scenario.agentId}']`), 'seeded agent card'); const initialCount = panel.querySelectorAll('[data-agent-card-id]').length; setValue(search, `no-match-${scenario.unique}`); await sleep(200); const countBeforeRefresh = panel.querySelectorAll('[data-agent-card-id]').length; const dirtyBeforeRefresh = refresh.classList.contains('home-list-toolbar-refresh-dirty'); search.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); await waitFor(() => panel.querySelectorAll('[data-agent-card-id]').length === 0, 'agent empty state'); const noResultsAfterRefresh = panel.querySelectorAll('[data-agent-card-id]').length === 0; setValue(search, scenario.agentName); await sleep(100); refresh.click(); await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`[data-agent-card-id='${scenario.agentId}']`), 'agent restored after refresh'); filter.click(); const popover = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`[data-home-list-filter-popover='true']`), 'agent filter popover'); const tagInput = await waitFor(() => popover.querySelector(`input[aria-label='Agent filters tag filter']`), 'agent tag filter input'); setValue(tagInput, scenario.tag); tagInput.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true })); await sleep(100); const statusSelect = popover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-status-filter='true']`); const sortBySelect = popover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-sort-by='true']`); const sortDirectionSelect = popover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-sort-direction='true']`); if (!(statusSelect instanceof HTMLSelectElement) || !(sortBySelect instanceof HTMLSelectElement) || !(sortDirectionSelect instanceof HTMLSelectElement)) { throw new Error('Missing agent popover selects'); } setValue(statusSelect, 'active'); setValue(sortBySelect, 'createdAt'); setValue(sortDirectionSelect, 'asc'); await sleep(100); const dirtyBeforeApply = refresh.classList.contains('home-list-toolbar-refresh-dirty'); const applyButton = Array.from(popover.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Apply'); if (!(applyButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { throw new Error('Missing agent apply button'); } applyButton.click(); await waitFor(() => filter.querySelector('.home-list-toolbar-filter-dot'), 'agent filter dot'); const filterDotAfterApply = filter.querySelector('.home-list-toolbar-filter-dot') !== null; filter.click(); const reopenedPopover = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`[data-home-list-filter-popover='true']`), 'agent popover reopened'); const resetButton = Array.from(reopenedPopover.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Reset'); if (!(resetButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { throw new Error('Missing agent reset button'); } resetButton.click(); await sleep(150); const filterDotAfterReset = filter.querySelector('.home-list-toolbar-filter-dot') !== null; const statusAfterReset = reopenedPopover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-status-filter='true']`); const sortByAfterReset = reopenedPopover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-sort-by='true']`); const sortDirectionAfterReset = reopenedPopover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-sort-direction='true']`); if (!(statusAfterReset instanceof HTMLSelectElement) || !(sortByAfterReset instanceof HTMLSelectElement) || !(sortDirectionAfterReset instanceof HTMLSelectElement)) { throw new Error('Missing agent selects after reset'); } return { newButtonLabel: newButton.textContent?.trim(), initialCountGreaterThanZero: initialCount > 0, unchangedBeforeRefresh: countBeforeRefresh === initialCount, noResultsAfterRefresh, dirtyBeforeRefresh, dirtyBeforeApply, filterDotAfterApply, filterDotAfterReset, searchAfterResetMatchesSeed: search.value === scenario.agentName, statusAfterReset: statusAfterReset.value, sortByAfterReset: sortByAfterReset.value, sortDirectionAfterReset: sortDirectionAfterReset.value, tagCountAfterReset: reopenedPopover.querySelectorAll(`button[aria-label^='Remove tag']`).length }; }

async () => { const sleep = (ms) => new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, ms)); const waitFor = async (predicate, label) => { const started = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - started < 5000) { const result = predicate(); if (result) { return result; } await sleep(50); } throw new Error(`Timed out waiting for ${label}`); }; const clickTextButton = async (label) => { const button = await waitFor(() => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === label), `button ${label}`); button.click(); await sleep(100); return button; }; const setValue = (field, value) => { const prototype = field instanceof HTMLInputElement ? HTMLInputElement.prototype : field instanceof HTMLSelectElement ? HTMLSelectElement.prototype : HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype; const descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(prototype, 'value'); descriptor?.set?.call(field, value); field.dispatchEvent(new Event(field instanceof HTMLSelectElement ? 'change' : 'input', { bubbles: true })); }; const scenario = window.__homeListToolbarScenario; if (!scenario) { throw new Error('Missing toolbar scenario seed'); } await clickTextButton('Councils'); const panel = await waitFor(() => document.querySelector('#home-panel-councils'), 'councils panel'); const search = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`input[aria-label='Search councils']`), 'council search'); const refresh = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`button[data-home-list-refresh-button='true']`), 'council refresh button'); const filter = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`button[data-home-list-filter-button='true']`), 'council filter button'); const newButton = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`button[data-home-list-new-button='true']`), 'council new button'); await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`[data-council-card-id='${scenario.councilId}']`), 'seeded council card'); const initialCount = panel.querySelectorAll('[data-council-card-id]').length; setValue(search, `no-match-${scenario.unique}`); await sleep(200); const countBeforeRefresh = panel.querySelectorAll('[data-council-card-id]').length; refresh.click(); await waitFor(() => panel.querySelectorAll('[data-council-card-id]').length === 0, 'council empty state'); const noResultsAfterRefresh = panel.querySelectorAll('[data-council-card-id]').length === 0; setValue(search, scenario.councilTitle); await sleep(100); search.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`[data-council-card-id='${scenario.councilId}']`), 'council restored after refresh'); filter.click(); const popover = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`[data-home-list-filter-popover='true']`), 'council filter popover'); const tagInput = await waitFor(() => popover.querySelector(`input[aria-label='Council filters tag filter']`), 'council tag filter input'); setValue(tagInput, scenario.tag); tagInput.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true })); await sleep(100); const statusSelect = popover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-status-filter='true']`); const sortBySelect = popover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-sort-by='true']`); const sortDirectionSelect = popover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-sort-direction='true']`); if (!(statusSelect instanceof HTMLSelectElement) || !(sortBySelect instanceof HTMLSelectElement) || !(sortDirectionSelect instanceof HTMLSelectElement)) { throw new Error('Missing council popover selects'); } setValue(statusSelect, 'active'); setValue(sortBySelect, 'createdAt'); setValue(sortDirectionSelect, 'asc'); await sleep(100); const dirtyBeforeApply = refresh.classList.contains('home-list-toolbar-refresh-dirty'); const applyButton = Array.from(popover.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Apply'); if (!(applyButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { throw new Error('Missing council apply button'); } applyButton.click(); await waitFor(() => filter.querySelector('.home-list-toolbar-filter-dot'), 'council filter dot'); const filterDotAfterApply = filter.querySelector('.home-list-toolbar-filter-dot') !== null; filter.click(); const reopenedPopover = await waitFor(() => panel.querySelector(`[data-home-list-filter-popover='true']`), 'council popover reopened'); const resetButton = Array.from(reopenedPopover.querySelectorAll('button')).find((node) => node.textContent?.trim() === 'Reset'); if (!(resetButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { throw new Error('Missing council reset button'); } resetButton.click(); await sleep(150); const filterDotAfterReset = filter.querySelector('.home-list-toolbar-filter-dot') !== null; const statusAfterReset = reopenedPopover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-status-filter='true']`); const sortByAfterReset = reopenedPopover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-sort-by='true']`); const sortDirectionAfterReset = reopenedPopover.querySelector(`select[data-home-list-sort-direction='true']`); if (!(statusAfterReset instanceof HTMLSelectElement) || !(sortByAfterReset instanceof HTMLSelectElement) || !(sortDirectionAfterReset instanceof HTMLSelectElement)) { throw new Error('Missing council selects after reset'); } return { newButtonLabel: newButton.textContent?.trim(), initialCountGreaterThanZero: initialCount > 0, unchangedBeforeRefresh: countBeforeRefresh === initialCount, noResultsAfterRefresh, dirtyBeforeApply, filterDotAfterApply, filterDotAfterReset, searchAfterResetMatchesSeed: search.value === scenario.councilTitle, statusAfterReset: statusAfterReset.value, sortByAfterReset: sortByAfterReset.value, sortDirectionAfterReset: sortDirectionAfterReset.value, tagCountAfterReset: reopenedPopover.querySelectorAll(`button[aria-label^='Remove tag']`).length }; }
